name: Cheery Cherry Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 can Thawed Frozen Orange Juice Concentrate (12 oz)
1 can Thawed Frozen Lemonade Concentrate (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin and sugar in boiling water.
2. Add pineapple juice, concentrates, and cold water; mix well.
3. Freeze the mixture until ready to serve.
4. Just before serving, add ginger ale and mix thoroughly.
